steps.title: Identify the required pattern
steps.content: The researcher claims some lakes show declining ice duration from the early 1980s to mid-2000s. Evidence must compare the same lake's ice days in 1980-81 and 2005-06, showing a decrease.

steps.title: Find the lake with declining ice days
steps.content: Kalmarinjarvi had 198 ice days in 1980-81 and 152 in 2005-06—a decline that matches the researcher's claim. Choices B and C compare different lakes rather than showing decline over time, while Choice D shows Lake Neusiedl gaining ice days (77 to 104), not losing them. That matches choice A — A is correct.
